import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut num = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
        if in_num
          result = list.push(result, num * sign)
          in_num = false
          sign = 1
          num = 0
        end
      else if b == 45
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, num * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line1)
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line2)
      let nums = parse_ints(line1)
      let targets = parse_ints(line2)
      match targets.get(0)
      when Some(target)
        match find_index(nums, target)
        when Some(idx)
          println("index=#{idx}")
        when None
          println("not_found")
        end
      when None
        println("not_found")
      end
    when None
      println("not_found")
    end
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end
